title: The surround sound in NGE Plaitnum and EoE
display_title: The surround sound in NGE Plaitnum and EoE
wikitext:
[]: The surround sound in NGE Plaitnum and EoE             Quote Post by chiefen » Sat Aug 06, 2005 11:39 pm Have anyone here watched NGE Platinum with 5.1 and EoE with 6.1? Just wanted to know if it's any good.

[]:             Quote Post by Winslow Leach » Tue Aug 09, 2005 2:50 pm I have a 5.1 system and they're both pretty good 5.1 mixes. The End of Evangelion is available in DTS though, which sounds a hell of lot better, louder and more realistic than Dolby Digital. It would have been a great presentation if they had only given us a fucking anamorphic widescreen transfer.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Tue Aug 09, 2005 3:56 pm Winslow Leach wrote: It would have been a great presentation if they had only given us a fucking anamorphic widescreen transfer.

[]:             Quote Post by Machinehead » Mon Aug 15, 2005 7:04 pm anatrok wrote: Winslow Leach wrote: It would have been a great presentation if they had only given us a fucking anamorphic widescreen transfer.
